commands.review_summary:
The PR adds one unreleased `CHANGELOG.md` fix entry documenting the Web Push VAPID default subject change from `mailto:openclaw@localhost` to `https://openclaw.ai`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR changes only the changelog. The underlying VAPID behavior is already covered on current `main` by source and focused tests.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is normal maintainer handling for a clean draft changelog PR.

target.title: docs(changelog): note VAPID subject fix
target.body:
## Summary

- Add the missing `CHANGELOG.md` entry for the already-merged Web Push VAPID default fix from #83317.
- Note that generated VAPID keys now default to `https://openclaw.ai` when `OPENCLAW_VAPID_SUBJECT` is unset, avoiding the old localhost mailbox subject rejected by Apple Web Push.
- Credit the original contributor and keep the release note tied to #83134 / #83317.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Follows #83317
- References #83134
- [x] This PR documents a landed bug fix

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: release notes now mention the already-landed Control UI/Web Push VAPID default fix so operators see the iOS PWA push setup change in the changelog.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout with the changelog-only branch, plus focused unit proof for the already-landed VAPID code path.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
git diff --check
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/push-web.test.ts
codex review --base origin/main
```

Evidence after fix: `git diff --check` is clean; `src/infra/push-web.test.ts` passes 13/13; local Codex review reported no actionable correctness issues in the changelog-only patch.

Observed result after fix: `CHANGELOG.md` includes a single unreleased fix entry for #83134 / #83317 with contributor credit.

What was not tested: live Apple Web Push delivery was not re-run here; #83317 already covered the code/docs change and this PR only adds the release note.

## Verification

- `git diff --check` — pass
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/push-web.test.ts` — 13/13 pass
- `codex review --base origin/main` — no actionable findings

## Notes

The first Testbox `pnpm check:changed` attempt from the sparse Codex worktree hit a false config-baseline failure; the full source checkout on `main` passes the same baseline check. A fresh PR checkout Testbox run is being used for the final changed gate.
